pages.image_tooltip: A small cave-dwelling duck inhabiting tropical islands, Talpanas is unable to see, swim, or fly, unfortunately making it the perfect target for §obfuscate, at the hands of whom it met its extinction.

pages.clone.clone_tooltip: Egg must be thrown to hatch
pages.activity.activity_tooltip: Active randomly throughout the day or based on specific factors
pages.feature_3.tooltip: §7Their blindness makes them susceptible to walking into hazards, ensure enclosures are safe!
pages.feature_1.tooltip: §7The artifact used to revive Talpanas is found in §aWarm Ocean Ruins§7
pages.feature_2.tooltip: §7Being recently-extinct animals, they are able to breed after eating §aHanging Roots§7

pages.feature_1.tooltip: §7What remains of their eyes are highly sensitive, they will avoid both natural and player-placed light
pages.feature_1.title_two_line: Light at the End of the Tunnel
